message.content:
<teammate-message teammate_id="team-lead" summary="Re-review: HTMX helpers extracted to shared module">
**Re-review request**: Luca has extracted `is_htmx_request()` and `htmx_response_with_announce()` to `src/routes/mod.rs`. All three route modules (`contexts.rs`, `inbox.rs`, `todos.rs`) now import from `super::` instead of having local copies.

Please re-read `src/routes/mod.rs`, `src/routes/contexts.rs`, and `src/routes/inbox.rs` to verify the refactoring, then confirm whether this resolves your blocking concern.
</teammate-message>

content.text: Let me also verify `todos.rs` uses the shared helpers too.
Clean. Let me also confirm there are no remaining local copies of these functions anywhere.

input.content:
## Carson Gross -- Re-review: Blocking concern resolved

Verified the refactoring:

- `is_htmx_request()` and `htmx_response_with_announce()` now live in exactly one place: `src/routes/mod.rs` (lines 16-30)
- `contexts.rs`, `inbox.rs`, and `todos.rs` all import via `use super::{htmx_response_with_announce, is_htmx_request};`
- No remaining local copies anywhere in `src/routes/`

This is the correct fix. Single definition, module-private visibility (not `pub` -- only sibling modules in `routes/` can use them), clean imports.

**FULL APPROVE.** No remaining concerns from the hypermedia architecture perspective.
input.summary: FULL APPROVE -- blocking concern resolved, duplication eliminated

routing.summary: FULL APPROVE -- blocking concern resolved, duplication eliminated
routing.content:
## Carson Gross -- Re-review: Blocking concern resolved

Verified the refactoring:

- `is_htmx_request()` and `htmx_response_with_announce()` now live in exactly one place: `src/routes/mod.rs` (lines 16-30)
- `contexts.rs`, `inbox.rs`, and `todos.rs` all import via `use super::{htmx_response_with_announce, is_htmx_request};`
- No remaining local copies anywhere in `src/routes/`

This is the correct fix. Single definition, module-private visibility (not `pub` -- only sibling modules in `routes/` can use them), clean imports.

**FULL APPROVE.** No remaining concerns from the hypermedia architecture perspective.

content.text: Blocking concern resolved. The HTMX helpers are now properly deduplicated in `src/routes/mod.rs` with all three route modules importing from the shared location. Full approve from the hypermedia architecture perspective.
